thinks.think: A clear glass Pyrex mixing bowl rests centrally on a dark surface. To the upper right, a red can labeled "PINK SALMON" is partially visible. White text overlaid across the top reads, "Share how your family made salmon patties in the comments below!" The scene is static, showing the empty bowl ready for preparation.

The scene remains completely static with no visible changes occurring. A clear glass Pyrex mixing bowl sits centrally on a dark countertop surface. To the upper right, a red can labeled "PINK SALMON" is partially visible. White text overlay persists across the top, inviting viewers to share family salmon patty recipes in the comments below.

A hand wearing a grey long-sleeved garment cracks a white egg into the center of the clear glass bowl. The raw egg contents, including a distinct yellow yolk, settle at the bottom. The initial text overlay vanishes, replaced by new white text stating "Add 1 egg." positioned above the bowl.

The hand withdraws from the frame, leaving the cracked raw egg with a bright yellow yolk resting centrally at the bottom of the clear glass mixing bowl. The white text instruction "Add 1 egg." remains fixed horizontally above the bowl, while the red salmon can stays partially visible in the upper right corner throughout the static shot.

A hand holding a silver metal fork enters the frame from the top, positioning the tines directly over the raw egg yolk inside the clear glass bowl. The white text overlay changes to read "Beat the egg." centered above the mixing vessel, replacing the previous instruction.

A hand holding a silver fork actively beats the raw egg inside the clear glass bowl. The fork tines pierce and break the bright yellow yolk, blending it with the egg white in a rapid, blurred motion. The white text instruction "Beat the egg." remains centered above the mixing vessel throughout the action.

The fork lifts away, leaving the fully beaten egg as a uniform yellow liquid resting at the bottom of the clear glass bowl. The white text instruction "Beat the egg." persists centered above the vessel, and the red salmon can remains partially visible in the upper right corner.

A hand holds a red can labeled "Double Q Pink Wild Caught Alaskan Salmon" centrally in the foreground. New white text overlay reads "Get 1 can of salmon. (14.75oz)". The glass bowl containing the beaten yellow egg mixture remains visible but slightly out of focus in the background.

The hand continues holding the red Double Q salmon can steady in the foreground, keeping the label fully visible. The white text overlay specifying the can size remains at the top. The glass bowl with the beaten egg mixture stays slightly out of focus in the background.

The red salmon can now rests upright on a white plate rather than being held. A black manual can opener lies to the left of the can. White text overlay changes to read, "Certain can openers, like this one, won't work." A hand holds the opener's black handle at the bottom left corner against the dark countertop surface.

The red salmon can sits on a white plate while a black manual can opener is held to its left. The text overlay stating certain openers won't work remains visible. The hand gripping the opener handle adjusts slightly, keeping the tool positioned near the can lid.

Two hands attach the black manual can opener to the rim of the red salmon can. The metal gears clamp onto the lid's edge as the user attempts to begin cutting. The can stays centered on the white plate, and the white text overlay regarding the opener remains visible above.

White text overlay updates to read "The traditional kind, does work." Two hands manipulate a black and silver manual can opener clamped onto the red salmon can's rim. The device cuts into the lid as the user turns the handle, with the can resting on a white plate.

Two hands manipulate a black manual can opener clamped onto the rim of a red salmon can resting on a white plate. The text "The traditional kind, does work" remains overlaid at the top. The cutting mechanism engages the lid edge as the user rotates the handle to slice through the metal.

White text overlay reads "Drain the juice." Two hands hold the open red salmon can over a white plate, exposing the liquid and fish inside. A silver fork lies on a second white plate to the right. The can is positioned to pour out the contents.

Two hands tilt the open red salmon can further over a white plate, causing yellowish liquid to pour out onto the surface. The text "Drain the juice." remains overlaid at the top. A silver fork rests on a separate white plate to the right.

Two hands hold the red salmon can over a white bowl on the right. The text overlay changes to "Add the salmon to a bowl." with a smaller note below regarding smell. A white plate with drained yellow liquid sits to the left. The can is tilted, ready to empty the solid fish contents into the bowl.

Two hands invert the red salmon can over a white bowl on the right. The solid pinkish-brown fish contents slide out, landing in a mound at the bottom of the bowl. The white text overlay remains visible at the top. To the left, the plate containing yellow liquid sits on the dark surface.

Two hands lift the inverted red can away, revealing a solid, cylindrical mound of pinkish-brown salmon sitting in the white bowl on the right. The text overlay regarding adding salmon remains at the top. To the left, the white plate containing the drained yellow liquid sits stationary on the dark surface.

The camera frames the white bowl with the cylindrical salmon mound centrally. New white text overlay reads "Removing the skin & bones is optional." A hand enters from the right side of the frame. The bowl containing the drained yellow liquid is excluded from this specific shot.

Two hands grasp the cylindrical salmon mound in the white bowl, pulling a chunk away from the top section. The text "Removing the skin & bones is optional" remains visible above as the solid fish mass is manually separated into distinct pieces by the fingers.

Two hands continue manually breaking apart the cylindrical salmon mound inside the white bowl, separating the pinkish-brown fish into smaller chunks. The text "Removing the skin & bones is optional" remains overlaid at the top as the fingers pull pieces away.

The white text overlay changes to state the bones are soft and full of nutrients, so they are left in and mash up easily. Two hands continue manipulating the pinkish-brown salmon chunks within the white bowl, pulling apart the fibrous texture and separating small pieces from the main mass.

Two hands manipulate pinkish-brown salmon chunks in a white bowl beneath white text stating they are soft and full of nutrients. The right hand, with a grey sleeve, isolates a small, light-colored piece between the thumb and forefinger, holding it above the bowl. The left hand holds the remaining fish mass inside the container while breaking the fish.

Two hands continue manipulating the pinkish-brown salmon chunks within the white bowl. The right hand isolates a small, soft piece of fish between the thumb and forefinger, demonstrating its texture, while the left hand holds the larger mass. The white text overlay about nutrients remains static at the top of the frame.

Two hands actively mash the pinkish-brown salmon chunks inside the white bowl. The fingers press and break apart the fish pieces, transitioning from holding a small fragment to crushing the main mass. The white text overlay explaining the nutrients remains visible at the top of the frame throughout the action.

The text overlay changes to white text reading "You can eat a bone straight from the can to try it first. It's not bad. *The salmon is already fully cooked". Hands continue breaking apart the pinkish-brown salmon chunks in the white bowl, picking at small pieces with fingers.

White text overlay states "You can eat a bone straight from the can to try it first. It's not bad. *The salmon is already fully cooked". Two hands actively pull apart and mash the pinkish-brown salmon chunks within a white bowl, separating small pieces from the main mass.

Two hands continue breaking apart pinkish-brown salmon chunks inside a white bowl. The text overlay regarding eating bones remains visible at the top. The fish mass is further shredded as fingers pull pieces away from the main mound.

The text overlay changes to "I'll give it a good mash with a fork." A hand holding a silver metal fork enters the white bowl containing the salmon chunks. The fork presses down into the pinkish-brown fish, beginning to crush and mix the pieces together within the container.

A hand holding a silver fork continues to vigorously mash the pinkish-brown salmon chunks inside the white bowl. The fish breaks down into smaller, flakier pieces as the fork presses and mixes the contents. The text overlay "I'll give it a good mash with a fork." remains visible at the top.

A hand holding a silver fork vigorously mashes the pinkish-brown salmon chunks inside the white bowl. The fish breaks down further into a finer, flakier consistency as the fork presses and mixes the contents. The text overlay "I'll give it a good mash with a fork." remains visible at the top of the screen.

The text overlay changes to "Add the salmon to the bowl with your egg from earlier." A hand lifts the white bowl containing mashed pinkish salmon. It positions the bowl over a larger clear glass bowl containing yellow liquid, tilting it slightly. The fork is no longer visible.

A hand tilts the white bowl containing mashed pinkish-brown salmon over a clear glass bowl filled with yellow liquid. The salmon chunks fall into the glass bowl, emptying the white container. The text overlay regarding adding salmon to the egg bowl remains visible at the top during the pouring action.

The white bowl is fully emptied of mashed salmon into the larger glass bowl containing yellow liquid. The empty white container is lifted away, revealing a mound of pinkish-brown fish resting atop the beaten egg mixture at the bottom of the clear glass vessel. The text overlay regarding adding salmon remains visible at the top.

A hand pours yellow Italian bread crumbs from a black measuring cup into the clear glass bowl containing the mashed salmon and beaten egg mixture. A silver fork rests inside the bowl against the fish. The white text overlay updates to read "Add: 1/2 cup of Italian bread crumbs" at the top left corner of the screen.

A hand continues pouring yellow crumbs from a black measuring cup into the glass bowl, enlarging the pile beside the salmon. The text "Add: 1/2 cup of Italian bread crumbs" remains at the top left. A silver fork rests inside the bowl against the mixture.

The on-screen text expands to include "1/4 cup of nonfat, plain Greek yogurt (or, use mayo)" below the bread crumbs instruction. A hand holds a black measuring cup above the glass bowl, where a mound of yellow crumbs rests next to the salmon and egg mixture.

Distinct white dollops of nonfat plain Greek yogurt rest on top of the pinkish salmon and yellow breadcrumb mixture inside the clear glass bowl. The text overlay remains visible at the top left, listing the specific quantities for the Italian bread crumbs and yogurt.

The on-screen text adds "1 & 1/2 teaspoon of Dijon mustard". A hand holding a spoon enters the frame from the upper right, dropping a small amount of yellow mustard into the glass bowl containing the salmon, breadcrumbs, and white yogurt dollops.

The text overlay fully displays "1 & 1/2 teaspoon of Dijon mustard" at the bottom of the ingredient list. A small dollop of yellow mustard is now visible in the glass bowl, resting near the white yogurt and yellow breadcrumbs atop the mashed salmon.

The text overlay updates to include "1 teaspoon of lemon juice" at the bottom of the list. A hand holding a spoon is partially visible in the upper right, hovering over the glass bowl containing the unmixed salmon, breadcrumbs, yogurt, and mustard. The bowl sits on a dark surface.

The text overlay remains static, displaying the full ingredient list including lemon juice. A hand holds a metal spoon over the clear glass bowl, which contains unmixed salmon, yellow breadcrumbs, white yogurt dollops, and mustard. The ingredients sit unmixed on the dark surface.

The text overlay updates to add "1 teaspoon of onion powder" to the ingredient list. A hand holding a spoon sprinkles a small amount of white powder into the clear glass bowl, joining the unmixed salmon, yellow breadcrumbs, white yogurt dollops, and mustard already inside.

The ingredient list on screen updates to include "1 teaspoon of garlic powder" at the bottom. A hand holding a spoon appears near the top right, adding the powder to the glass bowl which already contains salmon, breadcrumbs, yogurt, and mustard.

The text overlay adds "1 teaspoon of garlic powder" to the ingredient list. A hand holding a silver spoon is visible near the top right, depositing the powder into the glass bowl containing unmixed salmon, breadcrumbs, yogurt, mustard, and spices.

The text overlay updates to add "1/4 teaspoon of cayenne pepper (for a little heat)" to the ingredient list. A small amount of reddish-orange powder is now visible in the glass bowl, resting on top of the breadcrumbs and yogurt mixture alongside the other unmixed ingredients.

The glass bowl rests on a dark surface, containing unmixed salmon, yellow breadcrumbs, white yogurt, and spices. The white text overlay listing ingredients, ending with cayenne pepper, remains static on the left side. No hands appear to add or mix items; the scene holds steady on the prepared ingredients.

The on-screen text updates to read "Mix together." in white font at the top center. The clear glass bowl, filled with unmixed salmon, yellow crumbs, white yogurt, and red spices, sits on a black surface while a hand grips the bottom right rim.

A hand uses a silver fork to vigorously stir the ingredients inside the clear glass bowl. The fork breaks up the distinct piles of yellow breadcrumbs, white yogurt, and pink salmon, blending them with the red spices as the mixture begins to combine into a cohesive mass.

A hand uses a silver fork to vigorously stir the ingredients inside the clear glass bowl. The distinct piles of yellow breadcrumbs, white yogurt, and pink salmon blend together with red spices, forming a cohesive, wet, crumbly mass as the mixing continues.

A hand uses a silver fork to mix the beige, crumbly substance in the glass bowl. The mixture becomes increasingly uniform in texture. The white text "Mix together." remains at the top. The fork presses the wet, grainy mass against the bowl's interior.

A hand holds a silver fork, stirring the beige, crumbly mixture inside a clear glass bowl. The ingredients blend into a cohesive, wet mass as the fork presses against the bowl's interior. The white text "Mix together." stays centered at the top of the screen.

A hand uses a silver fork to mix the beige, crumbly ingredients inside a clear glass bowl. The text "Mix together." is displayed at the top. The mixture becomes increasingly uniform and cohesive as the fork presses and turns the wet, grainy mass against the bowl's interior.

A hand uses a silver fork to continue mixing the beige, crumbly ingredients inside a clear glass bowl. The text "Mix together." remains at the top. The mixture appears increasingly uniform and cohesive as the fork presses and turns the wet, grainy mass against the bowl's interior.

A hand uses a silver fork to mix a beige, crumbly substance inside a clear glass bowl. The white text "Mix together." remains at the top. The mixture appears cohesive and uniform as the fork presses into the wet, grainy mass.

The text overlay changes to "Form the patties." with instructions regarding a 1/3 measuring cup. A hand holds a black plastic measuring cup over the glass bowl containing the beige salmon mixture, preparing to scoop the mixture. The bowl rests on a dark surface next to a white plate with a blue pattern.

A hand lifts a black measuring cup filled with the beige salmon mixture. The white text overlay instructs to "Form the patties" and explains the cup is used for size consistency. The glass bowl containing the rest of the mixture sits on the dark surface nearby.

A hand holds a black measuring cup filled with the beige salmon mixture. White text overlays instructions to form patties using a 1/3 cup. Another hand enters from the left to receive the mixture as the cup is tilted.

A hand tilts a black measuring cup, depositing the beige salmon mixture into the open palm of another hand positioned below. The text overlay regarding forming patties with a 1/3 cup remains visible at the top of the frame.

Two hands press and shape the beige salmon mixture into a round patty. The white text overlay updates to read, "Mine are around 1/2" thick." The mixture is compacted between the palms to form the desired thickness.

Two hands press the beige mixture into a round shape, adhering to the on-screen text "Mine are around 1/2" thick." The hands then transfer the formed patty onto a white plate featuring a blue geometric rim, placing it next to existing patties.

Hands in grey sleeves place the beige patty onto the white plate with a blue geometric rim alongside other patties. The text "Mine are around 1/2" thick." remains at the top. The clear glass bowl with mixture sits to the left.

Hands clad in grey sleeves press and mold a scoop of the beige salmon mixture into a round patty shape. The white text "Mine are around 1/2" thick." stays visible at the top. A glass bowl containing the rest of the mixture sits on the left, next to a white plate with a blue geometric rim on the right.

Hands wearing grey sleeves press the beige salmon mixture between palms to form a flat, round patty. The white text "Mine are around 1/2" thick." remains at the top. A glass bowl with the remaining mixture sits on the left, next to a plate holding other formed patties on the right.

Hands wearing grey sleeves continue pressing the beige salmon mixture between palms to flatten it into a round patty. The text "Mine are around 1/2" thick." remains at the top. A glass bowl with mixture sits on the left, and a plate with other patties is visible on the right.

Hands wearing grey sleeves continue pressing the beige salmon mixture between palms to flatten it into a round patty. The text "Mine are around 1/2" thick." remains at the top. A glass bowl with mixture sits on the left, and a plate with other patties is visible on the right.

Hands wearing grey sleeves continue pressing the beige salmon mixture between palms to flatten it into a round patty. The text "Mine are around 1/2" thick." remains at the top. A glass bowl with mixture sits on the left, and a plate with other patties is visible on the right.

A black spatula slides under a beige salmon patty in a frying pan with hot oil. One patty shows a golden-brown cooked side, while two others remain unflipped. White text overlay reads "Then, flip them" and warns "*Careful, the oil is hot". A patterned plate is visible on the right.

A black spatula flips a beige patty in a black frying pan, revealing a golden-brown cooked surface. The utensil then lifts another golden-brown patty. White text overlay warns, 'Careful, the oil is hot'. Three round patties cook in the hot oil.

A black spatula flips the final beige patty in the pan, revealing its golden-brown cooked side. All three round patties now show their browned surfaces while frying in the oil. The text overlay warning about the hot oil remains at the top.

White text updates to state cooking duration: "I cooked mine for 2 minutes. *Or, until your desired doneness". A black spatula presses down on the center patty. All three round patties display golden-brown, cooked surfaces while sizzling in the oil within the black pan.

White text displays cooking duration instructions. A black spatula presses down on the center and right patties inside the black frying pan. The three round, golden-brown patties continue to cook in the oil as the utensil lifts away from the surface.

White text reads "I cooked mine for 2 minutes. *Or, until your desired doneness". A black spatula presses down on the rightmost golden-brown patty in the black frying pan. The utensil lifts away, leaving three round patties sizzling in the hot oil.

Three round, golden-brown patties sizzle in hot oil within a black frying pan. White text overlay reads "I cooked mine for 2 minutes. *Or, until your desired doneness". The spatula is no longer visible pressing them; the patties cook undisturbed in the pan.

The text overlay updates to "Afterwards, I transferred to a plate lined with paper towels." A black spatula lifts a golden-brown patty from the oil. A white paper towel on a plate appears in the lower foreground, positioned to receive the cooked food as it is removed from the pan.

A black spatula transfers the final golden-brown patty from the black frying pan onto a white paper towel, joining two other cooked patties. The text overlay "Afterwards, I transferred to a plate lined with paper towels" remains displayed at the top of the screen.

A black spatula lifts a golden-brown patty from the black frying pan and transfers it onto a white paper towel. The patty joins others already resting on the towel. The text overlay "Afterwards, I transferred to a plate lined with paper towels" remains displayed at the top of the screen.

A black spatula lifts a golden-brown patty from the oil-filled black pan and places it onto a white paper towel alongside other cooked patties. The text overlay "Afterwards, I transferred to a plate lined with paper towels" remains displayed at the top as the transfer completes.

A black spatula lifts the last golden-brown patty from the black frying pan. It transfers the patty onto a white paper towel, placing it next to two other cooked patties. The text overlay "Afterwards, I transferred to a plate lined with paper towels" remains displayed at the top of the screen.

The text overlay updates to "Cook the remaining patties." A hand places raw, beige salmon patties into the black frying pan containing hot oil, arranging them carefully alongside others already sizzling in the pan to begin the next cooking batch.

A hand places a third raw, beige patty into the black frying pan alongside two others already cooking in hot oil. The white text "Cook the remaining patties." remains displayed at the top. The hand carefully adjusts the position of the newly added patty to ensure even spacing within the pan.

A hand with a grey sleeve adjusts the top raw beige patty in the black frying pan containing hot oil. Two other uncooked patties sizzle nearby in the pan. The white text overlay "Cook the remaining patties." stays fixed at the top of the screen throughout the adjustment.

A hand wearing a grey sleeve adjusts the position of the top raw beige patty in the black frying pan filled with hot oil. Two other uncooked patties sizzle nearby. The text "Cook the remaining patties." remains visible at the top.

A hand wearing a grey sleeve adjusts raw beige patties sizzling in hot oil inside a black frying pan. The white text overlay "Cook the remaining patties." stays visible at the top. The hand presses down slightly on the uncooked discs, ensuring they are spaced evenly for cooking.

A hand wearing a grey sleeve presses down on the top raw beige patty in the black frying pan filled with hot oil. Two other uncooked patties sizzle nearby as the white text "Cook the remaining patties." remains visible at the top of the screen.

summary.text:
[0-4] A clear glass Pyrex mixing bowl rests centrally on a dark countertop. To the upper right, a red can labeled "PINK SALMON" is partially visible. White text overlaid reads, "Share how your family made salmon patties in the comments below!" The scene is static.

[4-8] A hand wearing a grey sleeve cracks a white egg into the center of the bowl. The raw egg contents, including a distinct yellow yolk, settle at the bottom. The text overlay changes to "Add 1 egg." The hand withdraws, leaving the egg inside.

[8-14] A hand holding a silver metal fork enters, positioning tines over the yolk. The text changes to "Beat the egg." The fork actively beats the egg, piercing and breaking the bright yellow yolk to blend it with the white. The fork lifts away, leaving the fully beaten egg as a uniform yellow liquid at the bottom.

From 20-24s, a red salmon can rests on a white plate while a black manual can opener is positioned nearby under the text 'Certain can openers, like this one, won't work.' Two hands attempt to clamp the opener's gears onto the lid's edge. At 24s, the overlay changes to 'The traditional kind, does work.' Two hands then manipulate a black and silver traditional manual can opener clamped to the can's rim. The user rotates the handle, engaging the cutting mechanism to slice through the metal lid effectively.

[16-18] A hand holds a red Double Q salmon can in front of a glass bowl with beaten egg mixture, under text "Get 1 can of salmon. (14.75oz)". [18-20] The can rests on a white plate beside a black manual can opener held by a hand; text reads "Certain can openers, like this one, won't work." [28-32] Hands hold the open can over a white plate to "Drain the juice," pouring yellowish liquid out while a silver fork rests on a separate plate. [32-34] Text updates to "Add the salmon to a bowl." with a note "*It's not pretty, & it won't smell good" as hands tilt the can over a white bowl, with the drained liquid visible on a plate to the left.

At [36-38], a red can is lifted from a white bowl, revealing a cylindrical mound of pinkish-brown salmon, while a plate of yellow liquid sits to the left under the text "Add the salmon to a bowl. *It's not pretty, & it won't smell good". From [38-40], the view centers on the salmon as the text updates to "Removing the skin & bones is optional." and a hand enters. Between [40-44], two hands manually pull apart the solid fish mass into chunks. Finally, at [44-46], the text explains "But they are soft & full of nutrients, so I leave them in. They mash up easily." as the hands continue separating the fibrous salmon pieces.

[46-52] Two hands manipulate pinkish-brown salmon chunks in a white bowl beneath white text stating "But they are soft & full of nutrients, so I leave them in. They mash up easily." The right hand, wearing a grey sleeve, isolates a small, light-colored piece between fingers to demonstrate texture, while the left hand holds the mass. The hands then transition to actively mashing and breaking apart the fish pieces within the container.
[52-56] The text overlay changes to "You can eat a bone straight from the can to try it first. It's not bad. *The salmon is already fully cooked". The hands continue to pull apart and mash the pinkish-brown salmon chunks inside the white bowl, separating small fragments from the main mass as the preparation continues.

[56-58] Two hands continue breaking apart pinkish-brown salmon chunks inside a white bowl while the text "You can eat a bone straight from the can to try it first. It's not bad. *The salmon is already fully cooked" remains visible. [58-60] The text updates to "I'll give it a good mash with a fork." A hand introduces a silver metal fork into the bowl, pressing down on the fish. [60-64] The hand vigorously mashes the pinkish-brown salmon chunks with the fork. The fish breaks down from larger pieces into a finer, flakier consistency as the fork presses and mixes the contents within the white bowl.

[66-70] A hand tilts a white bowl containing mashed pinkish-brown salmon over a clear glass bowl filled with yellow liquid. The text "Add the salmon to the bowl with your egg from earlier." remains visible at the top. The salmon chunks fall into the glass bowl, fully emptying the white container. This reveals a mound of pinkish-brown fish resting atop the beaten egg mixture at the bottom of the clear glass vessel.
[70-74] A hand pours yellow Italian bread crumbs from a black measuring cup into the clear glass bowl containing the mashed salmon and beaten egg mixture. A silver fork rests inside the bowl against the fish. The white text overlay updates to read "Add: 1/2 cup of Italian bread crumbs" at the top left corner. The hand continues pouring crumbs from the black cup, enlarging the yellow pile beside the salmon.

Inside a clear glass bowl, a mixture of mashed salmon, yellow Italian bread crumbs, and distinct white dollops of nonfat plain Greek yogurt sits unmixed. The text overlay "Add:" lists "1/2 cup of Italian bread crumbs" and "1/4 cup of nonfat, plain Greek yogurt (or, use mayo)". At [78], the list updates to include "1 & 1/2 teaspoon of Dijon mustard" as a hand uses a spoon to drop a small yellow dollop of mustard into the bowl near the other ingredients. By [82], the mustard rests visibly atop the mixture. Finally, at [82-84], the text overlay appends "1 teaspoon of lemon juice" while a hand holding a spoon hovers over the bowl, preparing to add the next ingredient.

[64-66] Text overlay reads "Add the salmon to the bowl with your egg from earlier." A hand lifts a white bowl containing mashed pinkish salmon, positioning it over a larger clear glass bowl holding yellow liquid. [74-76] The text updates to "Add: 1/2 cup of Italian bread crumbs" and "1/4 cup of nonfat, plain Greek yogurt (or, use mayo)". A hand holds a black measuring cup over the glass bowl, which now contains a mound of yellow crumbs beside the salmon mixture. White yogurt dollops appear. [84-86] The text list expands to include "1 & 1/2 teaspoon of Dijon mustard" and "1 teaspoon of lemon juice". A metal spoon hovers over the bowl, which holds unmixed salmon, yellow breadcrumbs, white yogurt, and mustard on a dark surface. [86-88] The overlay adds "1 teaspoon of onion powder". A hand uses a spoon to sprinkle white powder into the bowl, joining the existing unmixed ingredients.

From [92-96], the text overlay lists ingredients including "1/4 teaspoon of cayenne pepper (for a little heat)" while a glass bowl sits on a dark surface containing unmixed salmon, yellow Italian bread crumbs, white Greek yogurt, Dijon mustard, and spices like onion powder, garlic powder, and visible red cayenne pepper. At [96-98], the on-screen text changes to "Mix together." as a hand grips the bowl's rim. Finally, from [98-100], a hand uses a silver fork to vigorously stir the distinct piles of yellow crumbs, white yogurt, pink fish, and red spices, blending them into a cohesive mixture within the clear bowl.

[90-92] A hand holding a silver spoon deposits "1 teaspoon of garlic powder" into a glass bowl containing unmixed salmon, breadcrumbs, yogurt, mustard, and spices. A text overlay lists the full recipe: "Add: 1/2 cup of Italian bread crumbs 1/4 cup of nonfat, plain Greek yogurt (or, use mayo) 1 & 1/2 teaspoon of Dijon mustard 1 teaspoon of lemon juice 1 teaspoon of onion powder 1 teaspoon of garlic powder".
[100-106] A hand uses a silver fork to vigorously stir the ingredients. The distinct piles of yellow breadcrumbs, white yogurt, and pink salmon blend with red spices, transforming from separate components into a cohesive, wet, crumbly beige mass. The white text "Mix together." appears at the top as the fork presses the increasingly uniform mixture against the bowl's interior.

[108-112] A hand uses a silver fork to mix beige, crumbly ingredients inside a clear glass bowl. The white text "Mix together." remains at the top. The mixture appears cohesive and uniform as the fork presses into the wet, grainy mass. [112-116] The text overlay changes to "Form the patties." with instructions regarding a 1/3 measuring cup. A hand holds a black plastic measuring cup over the glass bowl containing the beige salmon mixture, preparing to scoop, then lifts the filled cup. The text explains the cup is used for size consistency. The bowl rests on a dark surface next to a white plate with a blue pattern.

[116-120] A hand holds a black measuring cup filled with the beige salmon mixture. White text overlays instructions to "Form patties using a 1/3 cup." Another hand enters from the left to receive the mixture as the cup is tilted. The hand tilts the black measuring cup, depositing the beige salmon mixture into the open palm of another hand positioned below. The text overlay regarding forming patties with a 1/3 cup remains visible at the top of the frame. [120-124] Two hands press and shape the beige salmon mixture into a round patty. The white text overlay updates to read, "Mine are around 1/2" thick." The mixture is compacted between the palms to form the desired thickness. The hands then transfer the formed patty onto a white plate featuring a blue geometric rim, placing it carefully next to other existing patties on the plate.

From 124s to 132s, the video segment focuses on the detailed process of forming salmon patties by hand. Initially, hands wearing grey sleeves place a formed beige patty onto a white plate with a blue geometric rim. A clear glass bowl containing the remaining mixture sits to the left. The text overlay "Mine are around 1/2" thick." is consistently displayed at the top. Subsequently, the hands take scoops of the beige salmon mixture and press them firmly between palms to mold them into flat, round shapes. This action of pressing and molding continues through 132s. The finished patties are placed onto the plate alongside others. This repetitive process ensures uniform thickness and shape for the patties, transforming the loose mixture from the bowl into structured discs ready for cooking. The hands carefully adjust the shape to maintain the half-inch thickness mentioned in the text.

[132-136] Hands in grey sleeves press beige salmon mixture into round patties, with text noting "Mine are around 1/2" thick." A glass bowl of mixture sits left, and a plate with other patties is on the right. [136-140] A black spatula slides under the patties in a frying pan with hot oil. One patty reveals a golden-brown cooked side. The spatula flips the patties while text warns, "Then, flip them. *Careful, the oil is hot". The utensil lifts another golden-brown patty as three round patties cook.

[106-108] A hand uses a silver fork to mix beige, crumbly ingredients inside a clear glass bowl while the text "Mix together." is displayed. The wet, grainy mass becomes increasingly uniform and cohesive as the fork presses it against the bowl's interior. [140-142] A black spatula flips the final beige patty in a black pan, revealing its golden-brown cooked side. The text "Then, flip them. *Careful, the oil is hot" is displayed. All three round patties now show browned surfaces while frying. [142-146] White text updates to state "I cooked mine for 2 minutes. *Or, until your desired doneness". The raw egg contents, including a distinct yellow yolk, settle at the bottom. The text overlay changes to "Add 1 egg." The hand withdraws, leaving the egg inside. [8-14] A hand holding a silver metal fork enters, positioning tines over the yolk. The text changes to "Beat the egg." The fork actively beats the egg, piercing and breaking the bright yellow yolk to blend it with the white. The fork lifts away, leaving the fully beaten egg as a uniform yellow liquid at the bottom. From 20-24s, a red salmon can rests on a white plate while a black manual can opener is positioned nearby under the text 'Certain can openers, like this one, won't work.' Two hands attempt to clamp the opener's gears onto the lid's edge. At 24s, the overlay changes to 'The traditional kind, does

At [36-38], a red can is lifted from a white bowl, revealing a cylindrical mound of pinkish-brown salmon, while a plate of yellow liquid sits to the left under the text "Add the salmon to a bowl. *It's not pretty, & it won't smell good". From [38-40], the view centers on the salmon as the text updates to "Removing the skin & bones is optional." and a hand enters. Between [40-44], two hands manually pull apart the solid fish mass into chunks. Finally, at [44-46], the text explains "But they are soft & full of nutrients, so I leave them in. They mash up easily." as the hands continue separating the fibrous salmon pieces.

[46-52] Two hands manipulate pinkish-brown salmon chunks in a white bowl beneath white text stating "But they are soft & full of nutrients, so I leave them in. They mash up easily." The right hand, wearing a grey sleeve, isolates a small, light-colored piece between fingers to demonstrate texture, while the left hand holds the mass. The hands then transition to actively mashing and breaking apart the fish pieces within the container.
[52-56] The text overlay changes to "You can eat a bone straight from the can to try it first. It's not bad. *The salmon is already fully cooked". The hands continue to pull apart and mash the pinkish-brown salmon chunks inside the white bowl, separating small fragments from the main mass as the preparation continues.

[56-58] Two hands continue breaking apart pinkish-brown salmon chunks inside a white bowl while the text "You can eat a bone straight from the can to try it first. It's not bad. *The salmon is already fully cooked" remains visible. [58-60] The text updates to "I'll give it a good mash with a fork." A hand introduces a silver metal fork into the bowl, pressing down on the fish. [60-64] The hand vigorously mashes the pinkish-brown salmon chunks with the fork. The fish breaks down from larger pieces into a finer, flakier consistency as the fork presses and mixes the contents within the white bowl.

[66-70] A hand tilts a white bowl containing mashed pinkish-brown salmon over a clear glass bowl filled with yellow liquid. The text "Add the salmon to the bowl with your egg from earlier." remains visible at the top. The salmon chunks fall into the glass bowl, fully emptying the white container. This reveals a mound of pinkish-brown fish resting atop the beaten egg mixture at the bottom of the clear glass vessel.
[70-74] A hand pours yellow Italian bread crumbs from a black measuring cup into the clear glass bowl containing the mashed salmon and beaten egg mixture. A silver fork rests inside the bowl against the fish. The white text overlay updates to read "Add: 1/2 cup of Italian bread crumbs" at the top left corner. The hand continues pouring crumbs from the black cup, enlarging the yellow pile beside the salmon.

recent_thinks.text: A hand holds a red can labeled "Double Q Pink Wild Caught Alaskan Salmon" centrally in the foreground. New white text overlay reads "Get 1 can of salmon. (14.75oz)". The glass bowl containing the beaten yellow egg mixture remains visible but slightly out of focus in the background.

Two hands invert the red salmon can over a white bowl on the right. The solid pinkish-brown fish contents slide out, landing in a mound at the bottom of the bowl. The white text overlay remains visible at the top. To the left, the plate containing yellow liquid sits on the dark surface.

The text overlay changes to "Add the salmon to the bowl with your egg from earlier." A hand lifts the white bowl containing mashed pinkish salmon. It positions the bowl over a larger clear glass bowl containing yellow liquid, tilting it slightly. The fork is no longer visible.

The on-screen text expands to include "1/4 cup of nonfat, plain Greek yogurt (or, use mayo)" below the bread crumbs instruction. A hand holds a black measuring cup above the glass bowl, where a mound of yellow crumbs rests next to the salmon and egg mixture.

Distinct white dollops of nonfat plain Greek yogurt rest on top of the pinkish salmon and yellow breadcrumb mixture inside the clear glass bowl. The text overlay remains visible at the top left, listing the specific quantities for the Italian bread crumbs and yogurt.

The on-screen text adds "1 & 1/2 teaspoon of Dijon mustard". A hand holding a spoon enters the frame from the upper right, dropping a small amount of yellow mustard into the glass bowl containing the salmon, breadcrumbs, and white yogurt dollops.

The text overlay fully displays "1 & 1/2 teaspoon of Dijon mustard" at the bottom of the ingredient list. A small dollop of yellow mustard is now visible in the glass bowl, resting near the white yogurt and yellow breadcrumbs atop the mashed salmon.
